creator: bill@springwoodsys.com
text:
Every time I close a message window under XFMail 1.4.0, the application 
dumps core w/signal 6. Same problem on two other machines: one 4.1-RELEASE, 
other 4.1-STABLE. Doesn't matter whether it's the package or the port. 
Previous builds of XFMail 1.4.0 did not have this problem on these 
systems. Appears to be related to xforms-0.89; XFMail 1.4.0 on all three 
machines worked fine when xforms-0.88.1 was used.

Fix: 

Unknown, but guessing that reverting to xforms-0.88.1 would be a 
workaround.
How-To-Repeat: Open any message. Close the message window. Application crashes; 
dumps core w/signal 6.
